query: Please assist in devising a week-long travel plan for a party of 5. We will depart from Marquette with the aim of visiting 3 cities in Michigan between March 6th and March 12th, 2022. Our budget is now set at $14,600. We should emphasize that our accommodations must be suitable for children under 10.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Marquette to Escanaba, duration: 3 hours 34 mins, distance: 362 km, cost: 18
plan.attraction: Ludington Park;Walk of Planets;Delta County Historical Society;UPutt Family Fun Center;Antique Village;William Bonifas Fine Arts Center;John D. Besse Park;Leigh’s Garden Winery;Escanaba Municipal Beach;Webster Marble Inventing the Outdoors Museum;Aronson Island;Escanaba Welcome Sign;

Braun Nature Preserve;Petoskey State Park;Headlands International Dark Sky Park;Wilderness State Park;Colonial Michilimackinac;Conkling Heritage Park;Bear River Valley Recreation Area;Mineral Well Park;Aloha State Park;McGulpin Point Lighthouse;Castle Rock;Oden Island Nature Preserve;Burt Lake State Park;Andrew J Blackbird Museum;Douglas Lake trail;Mystery Town, USA;BlissFest;Sunset Park;
plan.accommodation: Beautiful apartment ~25min from Times Square, Pellston
